creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
A new version of Herrie has been released: Herrie 1.3. This version has
a lot of new features, including support for HTTP audio streams.

A full announcement can be read here:

	https://lists.il.fontys.nl/pipermail/herrie/2007-January/000019.html

Fix: Herrie 1.3 installs the manual page as herrie.1.gz instead of herrie.1.
That's why we need to add MANCOMPRESSED=yes.
